nasb.text: You will no longer see a fierce people, A people of unintelligible speech which no one comprehends, Of a stammering tongue which no one understands.

esv.text: You will see no more the insolent people, the people of an obscure speech that you cannot comprehend, stammering in a tongue that you cannot understand.

cnv.text: 你必不再見那強暴的民了， 就是那說話深奧，難以明白， 舌頭結巴，難以聽懂的民。

ccb.text: 你们再也看不见那些残暴之徒了， 他们的言语奇怪、陌生、 无法听懂。

csbs.text: 你再也看不见那粗蛮的民， 他们言语晦涩，难于听懂， 舌头结巴，难以理解。
